events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need assess scenario: field service visit, LOTO, observed no try-step verification (SEQ). Work actively in progress. Need identify hazards, severity, immediate controls. Reference OSHA 1910.147. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. No try-step verification is non-compliant and dangerous because stored energy could remain, unexpected startup. Risk high or critical? LOTO without verification can lead to fatal injury. Severity high/critical. Since actively in progress, fail. Need fill fields. component_conditions: maybe non-compliant (procedure non-compliant), installed-defective? The component condition categories apply to component; no try-step verification is a procedural non-compliance, not component condition. Could list non-compliant. Maybe installed-defective? Not really. Use ["non-compliant"]. percent_complete maybe 50? value 0. sound_source etc default empty string/0. workable empty. findings: "LOTO procedure missing try-step verification", "Cannot confirm zero energy state; risk of unexpected energization or release of stored energy", "Active work occurring on unverified isolated equipment". actions: "Stop work immediately", "Apply lockout/tagout devices per OEM/employer procedure", "Perform try-step verification (attempt to start/operate controls) to confirm isolation", "Verify dissipation of stored/residual energy", "Retrain personnel on OSHA 1910.147 LOTO procedures", "Reinspect and document LOTO before resuming service work". references: "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4), (d), (f), (c)(7)(iv) try-step/verification of isolation". Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

events.label: response
events.text:
{
  "decision": "fail",
  "risk": "critical",
  "work_stage": "in-progress",
  "component_conditions": ["non-compliant"],
  "percent_complete": 50,
  "value": 0,
  "sound_source": "",
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "event_time": 0.0,
  "rate": 0.0,
  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "LOTO is in progress but the required try-step verification (start/operate attempt) has not been performed.",
    "Cannot confirm that hazardous energy has been effectively isolated or that stored energy has dissipated.",
    "Personnel are actively working on equipment that may still be energized or capable of unexpected startup/release of stored energy."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Stop work immediately and secure the area.",
    "Reapply LOTO devices per the employer/OEM procedure and ensure each energy-isolating device is properly locked/tagged.",
    "Perform try-step verification by attempting to start or operate the equipment to confirm isolation is effective.",
    "Verify all stored or residual energy has been relieved, disconnected, restrained, or otherwise rendered safe.",
    "Retrain involved personnel on OSHA 1910.147 LOTO requirements before resuming work.",
    "Document the corrected LOTO verification before continuing service work."
  ],
  "rationale": "OSHA 1910.147 requires verification of isolation through a try-step/operate attempt and control of stored energy before servicing. Skipping this step means the zero-energy state is unverified, creating a critical risk of unexpected energization, electric shock, crushing, or release of stored energy while work is actively in progress.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(4) energy control procedure",
    "OSHA 1910.147(d) application of energy control",
    "OSHA 1910.147(f) release from lockout/tagout",
    "OSHA 1910.147(c)(7)(iv) verification of isolation"
  ]
}
